panels.title: HIT rate (overall)
panels.description: Share of feedback spans with delegate.feedback.verdict="hit" over the selected range. Feedback spans live in their own trace per ADR 0007; they are joined to the parent delegation either by the `links` array or by delegate.feedback.parent_trace_id. Either join is sufficient for grouping in this panel because the rate is computed only over feedback spans.

panels.title: Untracked delegations
panels.description: Count of delegate.sh spans without a matching feedback span. Untracked rows are calibration debt — the recipe library cannot self-correct from production data without verdicts. The verdict nudge in delegate.sh prints a stderr reminder after every successful call to keep this number trending down.

panels.title: MISS count
panels.description: Raw count of feedback spans with verdict="miss". The top-N MISS table below this row breaks the misses down by reason and recipe so a recurring shape can be promoted into a `prompt-pattern` issue.

panels.title: HIT rate trend by recipe
panels.description: Per-recipe HIT-rate over time. Issue #187 added `delegate.recipe` as a feedback-span attribute at emit-time so this panel is a single-query group-by rather than the cross-trace join TraceQL doesn't support cleanly. Numerator: feedback spans with verdict="hit" grouped by `delegate.recipe`. Denominator: feedback spans with any verdict set grouped by `delegate.recipe`. Bare-tier calls (no `--recipe`) do not carry the attribute and so do not appear here — see panel 1's overall HIT-rate stat for the all-up figure including bare calls.

targets.query: {resource.service.name="delegate-to-ollama" && span.delegate.feedback.verdict="hit" && span.delegate.recipe != ""} | rate() by (span.delegate.recipe) / {resource.service.name="delegate-to-ollama" && span.delegate.feedback.verdict != "" && span.delegate.recipe != ""} | rate() by (span.delegate.recipe)

panels.title: Recent MISSes (by recipe + reason)
panels.description: Each row is one feedback span with verdict="miss". Grouped by `delegate.recipe` (#187 added this attribute to the feedback span so the column is a direct projection rather than a cross-trace join). The reason column is the free-text reason the user typed via `delegate-feedback.sh miss "<reason>"` and is only present when `DELEGATE_OTEL_INCLUDE_CONTENT=1` is set against a trusted collector (Track F #158 gated content fields by default). When the same reason recurs three times in a 30-day window, the delegate-feedback.sh runtime nudge prints a draft `gh issue create` command pre-targeted at the `prompt-pattern` label — this table is the dashboard counterpart of that nudge.
